bug.description: protocol timer configured with incorrect duration violating 3GPP timing requirements

prompt:
There is a protocol timer configured with incorrect duration violating 3GPP timing requirements downstream of function nr_mac_update_pdcch_closed_loop_adjust in the openair2/LAYER2/NR_MAC_gNB subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/LAYER2/NR_MAC_gNB/gNB_scheduler_primitives.c:4103.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
